title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel explores the next training paradigm beyond scaling, discussing concepts like grindability, verifiability, RLVR generalization, weight updates, and dreaming. The discussion covers major research bets being made by AI labs and speculates on the training landscape in 2027.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel examines what could follow pure scaling as the dominant AI training paradigm, working through concepts including grindability, verifiability, RLVR and its generalization, weight updates, and dreaming. The discussion maps the major research bets AI labs are placing and speculates on what the training landscape might look like by 2027. It situates reinforcement learning and test-time compute within that shift, treating verifiability and grindability as constraints on which tasks new methods can target.
